namespaces.name: Ess.Mark
namespaces.doc: .object(guid, {radar=, pda=, world=, disc=, kind=, rgb=, radius=, discAlpha=, size=, dist=}), .zone(x,y,z,r, {world=, radar=, pda=, icon=, kind=, rgb=, discAlpha=, size=, dist=}), .clear(handle) — every surface (radar / PDA / ground ring / floating icon) is an independent opt, so one call covers any combination
